docs.description: Card-like container with composable header, content, and footer primitives.

anatomy.name: Panel
anatomy.note: Root container with variant support (default bordered, borderless) and as prop (div, article, section, aside)

anatomy.name: PanelHeader
anatomy.note: Flex header bar with 3 style variants (default, terminal, subtle). Compose children directly for key-value layouts.

anatomy.name: PanelContent
anatomy.note: Padded content area with configurable spacing

anatomy.name: PanelFooter
anatomy.note: Bottom metadata/action row with top border and muted background

notes.title: Semantic HTML
notes.content: Panel accepts as prop to render as article, section, or aside instead of div. For accessible card-like regions, use as="article" with aria-labelledby pointing to the header.

notes.title: Header Variants
notes.content: PanelHeader supports 3 variants: default (card-like with border and background), terminal (compact uppercase bar), and subtle (light centered text).

notes.title: Header with Value
notes.content: PanelHeader uses flex layout by default. Place children directly for key-value headers: wrap the label and value in separate elements and they will be spaced with justify-between.

notes.title: Footer
notes.content: PanelFooter provides a consistent trailing section for metadata or actions while preserving the same panel visual language.
